gotchas: GitHub PR comments do NOT render `ansi` color blocks (they print raw escapes) — only `diff`
`next-env.d.ts` is gitignored, so a bare `tsc` in CI lacks Next's asset/route types → asset
`ts:build`'s `|| node -e "<fail>"` swallowed tsc's exit → the type leg was silently green on
Workflow `permissions:` is allowlist-only; PR comments need `pull-requests: write`.
Tree-level report retention ≠ git-history retention — only orphan-reset shrinks a clone.
